sys_script_fix.description:
DEPRECATED 2.7 - Templates used duration to generate due dates on tasks. NOTE: update in 2.8.4 | 2023-11-06 | STRY0146507 - Certification Failed Test Results - DEPRECATED
2.7 - Templates used duration to generate due dates on tasks. This was confusing and required the user to calculate hours to get to a due time based on the time the template was run. The updates will allow users to set a scheduled number of days for a task and set a time the task is due on that day.
sys_script_fix.name: Tasker 2.7-Convert Duration to Days/Time
